info.title: AAAA Nexus API
info.description: Formally verified AI safety APIs for autonomous agents. Supports REST, MCP, A2A (Google protocol), and x402 micropayment protocol.

X402PaymentProof.name: X-Payment-Proof
X402PaymentProof.description: Base64-encoded USDC payment proof for x402 autonomous payment flow (Base L2, Polygon, or Solana)

PaymentRequired.description: Payment required. Use x402 protocol: send USDC on Base L2, Polygon, or Solana to the treasury address provided in the response, then retry with the X-Payment-Proof header.

BadRequest.description: Invalid request body or missing required fields.

get.description: Returns current service status, version, build date, entropy epoch, and HELIX subsystem flags.
Returns the full OpenAPI 3.x specification for this API.
Returns the Google A2A protocol agent card for agent discovery and capability advertisement.
Returns the MCP server manifest for client auto-discovery.
Returns the OpenAI plugin manifest for ChatGPT plugin discovery.
Returns machine-readable pricing for all API endpoints.
Alternative path for the A2A agent card, for compatibility with various A2A client implementations.
Returns the current entropy epoch for zero-RTT A2A handshakes. No authentication required.
Returns a verifiable quantum random value with cryptographic proof. No authentication required.
Verify that the current epoch random value is valid and has not been tampered with.

post.description: Generate deterministic random values from a provided seed. Paid endpoint.
Generate a batch of random values in a single request. Paid endpoint.
Stream random values via Server-Sent Events. Paid endpoint.

schema.description: Server-Sent Events stream of random values

post.description: Generate premium verifiable random bytes with cryptographic proof. Paid endpoint.
Register an agent in the swarm topology. Compatible with the Google A2A protocol. No authentication required.

get.description: Returns live swarm topology statistics for all registered agents. No authentication required.
Look up the current status of a registered agent.
List the registered capabilities for a specific agent.
Search for agents that provide a specific capability.
Check the health status of a specific agent.
Discover available agents in the network. Compatible with Google A2A discovery protocol.

post.description: Update the capabilities and metadata of a registered agent.
Remove an agent from the swarm topology.
Send a direct message to a specific agent in the swarm.
Negotiate terms and conditions between two agents for a collaborative task.
Delegate a task to another agent in the swarm network.
Compute a semantic diff between two agent outputs to identify meaningful differences. Costs $0.04/call.
Detect logical contradictions between agent outputs. Costs $0.02/call.

example: The model fails 20% of the time

get.description: Poll queued messages for the registered agent. No authentication required.

post.description: Relay a message through the swarm network to reach a target agent.
Broadcast a message to all members of the swarm group.
Join a swarm group to receive broadcasts and participate in swarm activities.
Leave a swarm group.

get.description: Returns swarm-scoped topology. Same data as /v1/agents/topology but scoped to the swarm group.
List all peers in the swarm group.

post.description: Detect hallucinations with a certified upper bound. Returns a formally proved hallucination probability bound. Costs $0.002/call.

claim.example: Water boils at 100°C at sea level

example.claim: The capital of France is Paris

post.description: Register a new RatchetGate session to mitigate session fixation attacks. Costs $0.002/call.
Advance the session ratchet window to trigger re-keying. Costs $0.002/call.

get.description: Health probe for a ratchet session. Free endpoint.
Check the status of a ratchet session. Costs $0.004/call.

post.description: Revoke a ratchet session, invalidating all associated keys.
Verify the integrity of a ratchet session, ensuring no tampering has occurred.

get.description: List all active ratchet sessions. Requires API key.

post.description: Verify agent identity in untrusted networks with Sybil-resistance and a formally proved depth limit. Costs $0.020/call.
Register a new agent identity in the identity registry.

get.description: Look up a registered identity by agent ID.

post.description: Revoke a registered agent identity.
Issue a cryptographic challenge to verify an agent's identity.

get.description: Sybil-resistance check on the calling IP address. Free endpoint.

post.description: Compute a multi-vector threat score (velocity, behavioral, and intent) for an agent interaction. Costs $0.003/call.
Perform deep threat analysis on an agent or interaction pattern.
Report a threat incident involving a specific agent.
Block a threatening agent from further interactions.

duration_s.description: Block duration in seconds, 0 for permanent

get.description: Retrieve the threat history for a specific agent.
Returns the current trust ceiling value, reflecting the bounded monotonicity decay. Free endpoint.

post.description: Compute a bounded trust score for on-chain governance (TCM-100-BoundedMonotonicity). Costs $0.04/call.

get.description: Retrieve trust score history for an agent. Costs $0.04/query.

post.description: Verify regulatory compliance for a data operation with formal proof. Supports GDPR and CCPA jurisdictions. Costs $0.005/call.
Generate an EU AI Act compliance certificate for an AI system. Costs $0.04/check.
Generate a fairness proof certificate for a model. Costs $0.04/check.
Generate an explainability certificate for a model decision. Costs $0.04/call.
Verify data lineage chain integrity. Costs $0.04/call.
Log a human oversight event for an AI system. Costs $0.02/event.

get.description: Retrieve oversight event history for a system. Costs $0.02/query.

post.description: Report an AI system compliance incident. Costs $0.02/report.

get.description: Retrieve the incident registry for a system. Costs $0.02/query.

post.description: Generate a transparency report for an AI system. Costs $0.08/report.
Check for model drift between reference and current windows. Costs $0.01/check.

get.description: Retrieve a drift certificate by ID. Costs $0.01/cert.

post.description: LLM chat completion with built-in hallucination guard and safety guarantees. Costs $0.015/call.
Streaming LLM inference via Server-Sent Events (SSE) with reasoning trace. Costs $0.025/call.

example.content: Explain formal verification step by step.

200.description: SSE stream of completion chunks and chain-of-thought

schema.description: Server-Sent Events stream. Each event is a JSON object with a 'type' field ('thinking', 'content', or 'done').

post.description: Generate text embeddings using the inference engine. Costs $0.01/call.
Classify text using the inference engine. Costs $0.01/call.

get.description: List all available inference models. Free endpoint.

post.description: Compress data using HELIX tensor compression. Free tier and paid pro tier available.
Decompose a goal into an action plan for autonomous agent execution. Costs $0.015/call.

goal.example: Deploy a web service with zero downtime

constraints.description: Optional constraints for the plan (e.g., time limits, resource caps)

post.description: Classify agent intent from natural language text. Returns the top-3 intent classifications. Costs $0.005/call.

text.example: I need to fetch user data and store it in the database

post.description: Get the A2A trust score and compliance status for an agent. Costs $0.010/call.
Generate an extractive summary of the provided text. Costs $0.010/call.

text.example: Formal verification is the act of proving or disproving the correctness of intended algorithms underlying a system with respect to a certain formal specification or property, using formal methods of mathematics.

post.description: Classify the sentiment of the provided text. Costs $0.005/call.

text.example: This API is incredibly reliable and easy to use.

post.description: Extract named entities from text. Costs $0.02/call.
Translate text to a target language. Costs $0.02/call.
Classify text into predefined or custom categories. Costs $0.02/call.
Generate text embeddings for semantic similarity and search. Costs $0.02/call.
Extract keywords and key phrases from text. Costs $0.02/call.
Compute semantic similarity between two texts. Costs $0.02/call.
Rewrite text in a different style or tone. Costs $0.02/call.
Extract structured data from unstructured text. Costs $0.02/call.
Detect the language of the provided text. Costs $0.01/call.
Tokenize text into tokens. Costs $0.01/call.

get.description: Returns platform metrics: endpoint count, pricing tiers, uptime. Free endpoint.
Returns the HELIX compression service manifest. Free endpoint.
Returns a catalog of BitNet/HELIX compressed model downloads. Free endpoint.

post.description: Create a Stripe Checkout session for purchasing credit or prompt packs. No authentication required.

get.description: List all active Stripe prices for credit and prompt packs. No authentication required.

post.summary: Verify payment and retrieve API key
post.description: Verify a completed payment and retrieve the associated API key. No authentication required.

get.description: Browse the model leaderboard. Free endpoint.
View quarantined models that failed verification. Free endpoint.

post.description: Verify a model submission for the Forge marketplace. Requires API key.
Submit a model delta (incremental update) to the Forge marketplace. Requires API key.

get.description: Get a quality badge for a model. Free endpoint.

post.description: Optimize liquidity provider parameters for DeFi positions. Fee: $0.08 + 0.2% of position size.
Compute a risk score for a DeFi position. Costs $0.08/call.
Verify oracle integrity and detect price manipulation. Fee: $0.04 + 0.1% of tvl_at_risk.
Check liquidation risk for a DeFi position. Fee: $0.04 + 1% of net equity.
Verify cross-chain bridge transaction integrity. Costs $0.08/verification.
Automated smart contract security audit. Costs $0.15/audit.
Optimize yield strategy across DeFi protocols. Fee: $0.04 + 2% of alpha.
Verifiable random function draw for gaming applications. Fee: $0.01 + 0.5% of pot_value_usd.
Verify a previous VRF draw. Included with draw fee.
Register a service level agreement between agents. Costs $0.08/call.
Report an SLA violation. Costs $0.02/call.

get.description: Check the status of an SLA. Costs $0.008/call.

post.description: Create an escrow between two agents. Costs $0.04/call.
Release escrowed funds to the payee. Costs $0.02/call.
Open a dispute on an escrow. Costs $0.06/call.

get.description: Check the status of an escrow. Costs $0.008/call.

post.description: Record an agent interaction in the reputation ledger. Costs $0.02/call.

get.description: Get the reputation score for an agent. Costs $0.008/call.
Get the reputation history for an agent.

post.description: Initialize an AAAA Shield session for post-quantum secure communication.
Perform a post-quantum key exchange using Kyber or similar lattice-based algorithms.
Verify the integrity of an AAAA Shield session.
Rotate the cryptographic keys for an AAAA Shield session.

get.description: Get the status of an AAAA Shield session.

post.description: Validate a UCAN delegation chain for correctness and authorization.

post.description: Revoke a delegation, invalidating the entire sub-chain.

Get the delegation depth for an agent.

post.description: Create a new UCAN token with specified capabilities.
Verify a UCAN token and its delegation chain.
Revoke a UCAN token.
Create a delegated UCAN token from an existing token, narrowing capabilities.
Generate a new cryptographic key pair for agent identity or encryption.
Rotate an existing key pair, generating a new key and deprecating the old one.
Revoke a key pair, marking it as permanently unusable.
Perform a zero-day threat assessment. Costs $0.04/call.

get.description: Check the remaining credit balance for the API key.
Retrieve credit usage history for the API key.
Get a detailed breakdown of credit usage by endpoint and time period.

get.description: Retrieve the audit trail. Costs $0.02/query.
Export the full audit log. Costs $0.08/export.

post.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) endpoint. Available tools: health, metrics, oracle_entropy, oracle_hallucination, ratchetgate_session, ratchetgate_register, ratchetgate_advance, inference, inference_stream.
Google Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol endpoint. Supports methods: message/send, tasks/get.
